revision.comment: bypass module redirect - revert if anything went wrong
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<!---->}}<!---->}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<!---->}}<!---->}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}

</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}<!-- only when both params are passed
-->|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|<!--with a
      link-->[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]<!--
         -->}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}<!--End of {{cite magazine}}-->{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}<!-- End of main #if
-->{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
<!-- Add categories and interwikis to the /doc subpage, not here! -->

[[Category:Templates]]

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24947213578|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{#if: {{#if: {{{issue|}}}|{{#if: {{{date|}}} | yes}} }}|{{cite magazine
 |newspaper={{#if: {{{nolink|}}}|The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette|[[The {{#switch: {{lc:{{{city|}}} }}
                 | b | belfast = Belfast
                 | e | edinburgh = Edinburgh
                 | o | oxford = Oxford
                 | #default = London
                 }} Gazette]]}}
 |type={{#invoke:London Gazette util|type_param|display-supp={{{display-supp|}}} |supp={{{supp|}}}}}

 |url={{#invoke:London Gazette util|url_param|city={{{city|}}}|issue={{{issue|}}}|supp={{{supp|}}}|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |title={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{title}}}|No. {{{issue|}}} }}
 |issue={{#if: {{{title|}}}|{{{issue|}}} }}

 |page={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=page|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
 |pages={{#invoke:London Gazette util|make_page_param|param=pages|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}

 |date={{{date|}}}
 |postscript={{{postscript|}}}
 |ref={{{ref|{{harvid|Gazette|{{{issue|}}}<}}<}}}
 |mode={{{mode|}}}
 |quote={{{quote|}}}
}}{{#invoke:London Gazette util|page_error|page={{{page|}}}|pages={{{pages|}}}}}
|{{Error|1=You must specify {{And list|{{#if:{{{issue|}}}||'''''issue='''''}}|{{#if:{{{date|}}}||'''''date='''''}}}} when using {{tl|London Gazette}}.}}
}}{{#ifeq:{{{supp|}}}|y|}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]

[[Category:Pages containing London Gazette template with parameter supp set to y|{{{issue|}}}]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
